name: Balsamic Glazed Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 each Pepper, red, cut in 3/4-inch strips
1 each Pepper, green, cut in 3/4-inch strips
1 each Pepper, yellow, cut in 3/4-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a non-stick fry pan, heat the oil over medium heat.
2. Add chicken; cover and cook, turning occasionally, for about 10 minutes until the pieces are brown on all sides. Remove the chicken from the pan; set aside.
3. To the drippings in the pan, add onion, peppers, and garlic. Cook, stirring, for about 5 minutes or until slightly tender.
4. Add tomatoes, vinegar, and red pepper flakes. Heat mixture to boiling; reduce heat and simmer until the mixture is slightly thick (about five minutes).
5. Stir in the olives, salt, and pepper. Return chicken to the pan; spoon sauce over chicken and cook for about 20 minutes or until the chicken is glazed and fork tender.
6. Arrange the chicken on a serving platter. Spoon the vegetable mixture over the chicken. Sprinkle with pine nuts. Garnish with basil sprigs.
